location: Random drop from Clayman enemies patrolling the lit ruins of Siofra River (best farmed northeast of Siofra River Well grace) — also drops from Claymen at Uhl Palace Ruins in Ainsel River, though those enemies hit harder.
tactics: Claymen are slow, lumbering mud-golem enemies — easy to outrun or bait into whiffing an attack before punishing
Siofra River's Claymen are lower-level than Ainsel River's, making it the gentler farm spot of the two
Equip the Silver Scarab talisman and eat a Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot to raise the roughly 2% drop rate
From Siofra River Well grace, head northeast into the brightly lit ruins where multiple harpoon-wielding Claymen patrol or stand idle
lore: A harpoon tipped with a shard of sharpened meteorite, wielded by the Claymen who haunt the buried dynastic ruins — the shard glows faintly and cuts with magic rather than plain steel.

builds.name: Strength/Intelligence hybrid poke
builds.why: Splits D-scaling across Strength, Dexterity and Intelligence plus flat magic damage, rewarding a light Intelligence investment on an otherwise melee build
